title: ArazzoLockFile
description: Records the parameters and resolved source descriptions used for an Arazzo workflow code-generation run, so subsequent runs can skip generation when nothing has changed (incremental) and a fetched-from-remote generation is reproducible.

arazzoFileHash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the RFC 8785 canonical form of the Arazzo document content.

rootNamespace.description: The root namespace for generated types.

clientName.description: The client name prefix, if specified.

durable.description: Whether durable (checkpoint & resume) executors were generated.

sources.description: The source descriptions the Arazzo document resolved, each pinned by the SHA-256 digest of the exact bytes loaded (local file or remote url). Regeneration compares each source's current digest against these to detect drift.

generatedFiles.description: The list of generated file names, relative to the output directory.

resolvedSource.title: ResolvedSource
resolvedSource.description: A source description resolved during generation, pinned by the digest of its loaded bytes.

name.description: The sourceDescriptions[].name this document was referenced as (informational; the uri is the identity).

uri.description: The absolute URI the source resolved as (a file:// path or an http(s) url).

digest.description: The lowercase-hex SHA-256 of the exact bytes loaded for this source.
